title: Gift of the Depths

markdown:
# Gift of the Depths

You can breathe underwater, and you gain a [[swim_speed Speed]] equal to your [[speed]].

You can also cast [[water_breathing Breathing]] once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast it in this way again when you finish a [[long_rest Rest]].
